raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Accessing emergency addiction recovery services will now be easier thanks to a new law.",
    "The new law streamlines regulatory requirements, enabling additional healthcare facilities to accept more patients for addiction and substance use disorder treatments.",
    "Previous laws restricted the types of facilities that can offer care for substance use disorders.",
    "According to data from the Centers for Disease Control, drug overdose deaths in California have increased from just over 4,500 in a year to 11,774 reported overdose deaths in 2023.",
    "A policy brief found that overdoses disproportionately impact vulnerable populations.",
    "Only 10% of Californians with an addiction receive treatment.",
    "Since 2017, drug overdose deaths have risen among teenagers (15 to 19) by 370% and among Black and Latinx Californians by 200%."
  ]
}
```
